summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Discord RP bot refinements for live play quality. New scene-response endpoint working perfectly with combined multi-player turns, shorter GM responses (under 1500 chars), and proper German output. All backward compatibility endpoints functioning correctly. Frontend dashboard and navigation fully operational.

design_issues.issue: Frontend uses English labels instead of German for some navigation items

passed_tests: POST /api/gm/scene-response with single player action returns short German response (1305 chars)
POST /api/gm/scene-response with two player actions returns combined response addressing both players (953 chars)
POST /api/gm/scene-response response length constraint test - responses under 1500 chars for normal scenes
POST /api/gm/scene-response properly addresses both Erik and Maria in combined response
POST /api/gm/message-driven still works for backward compatibility with smart context
POST /api/gm/generate-campaign still works - generates German campaigns
POST /api/memory/smart-context still works - returns focused context with stats
POST /api/memory/extract-events still works - extracts 3 structured events from narrative
GET /api/campaigns still works - lists 14 campaigns
GET /api/player-characters still works - lists player characters
GET /api/bot/status returns correct data with player_characters count
All existing memory system endpoints working (events, relationships, knowledge, scene memory)
All existing GM engine features working (campaign generation, character questions, relationships)
All existing CRUD operations working (campaigns, NPCs, lore, player characters, allowed players)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with campaign stats (14 campaigns, 1 NPC, 48 events)
Frontend: All 8 navigation pages accessible (Dashboard, Campaigns, Characters, NPCs, Lore, Rules & Tone, Channels, Event Log)
Frontend: Recent events display German text from GM responses
Frontend: No JavaScript errors or broken functionality
German language output confirmed in all GM responses and recent events
Scene-response endpoint properly handles per-scene turn logic
Response length constraints working (normal responses under 1500 chars, most under 1000 chars)
Combined multi-player response functionality working correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% (62/62 tests passed including 3 new scene-response tests)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (scene-response endpoint fully integrated with memory system)
